channel.title: Sukhwinder Amrit on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Sukhwinder Amrit on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: tu mud mud mohabbat da izhaar na kar
item.description:
tu mud mud mohabbat da izhaar na kar asin tan dewaane haan, tu pyar na kar

tu devenga shaavan oh todange patte k rahian te bahuta v itbaar na kar

asin tainu audan ch hanjuan na(al) sinjia tu sanu tan shaavan ton inkaar na kar

oh dinda hai mainu hyati de supne te kehnda hai saahan te itbaar na kar

khizawan ch karda e shaavan de waade gareeban na(al) haase mere yaar na kar (khiza=autumn, patjhad)

item.title: tere mud aaun di dil nu aje b aas baki hai
item.description:
Sukhwinder Amrit

tere mud aaun di dil nu aje b aas baki hai k mere dard de tan te eho hi libaas baki hai

jadon hasdi haan hanjhu shalak aaunde ne subhavik hi mere ehsaas de tan te same di laash baaki hai

eh meri akh da athar, kahani da hai ik akhar te meri hiqq de wich dard da itihaas baki hai

tere seene ch thaathan maarda daria mohabbat da mere seene ch kai tapde thalan di pyas baki hai

item.title: kavita nahi tu pyar te poori kitaab likh
item.description:
A very very happy new year to all the readers. In the form of first post in 2009, here goes a wonderful & inspirational  poem by Sukhwinder Amrit:

kavita nahi tun pyar te poori kitaab likh kaale swaal sun te chitte jawab likh

tu nafartan da tarzuma kar de khaloos wich te kandian nu katt ke khidia gulab likh

likhde ne kuch k lok bas sooli saleeb hi par tu harek rukh nu gaundi rabab likh

item.title: main zara turna ki sikhia...
item.description:
main zara turna ki sikhia, raah samundar ho gaye fir pata nahi pair mere kis taran par ho gaye

si mere seene ch enni pyar tere di agan dhal gaye sab teer khanjar dhal ke baktar ho gaye

pehlan tan main aatma tak paardarshi hi rahi fir tere chumman meri kaya de bastar ho gaye

mere dil wich dard de lakhan parinde kaid sann bas teri ik shoh de sadka sabh sutantar ho gaye

item.title: jad v main apne ishq da koi wakia likhan
item.description:
jad v main apne ishq da koi wakia likhan khud nu khudai ishq nu apna khuda likhan

fullan te titlian di ik lammi katha likhan qudrat nu suche ishq da hi silsila likhan

na tan likhan mein theekran na hi guache jal jad v likhan main neer da bharia ghada likhan

main kyon likhan hayaat nu bandish te bebasi khulli fiza likhan kade wagdi hava likhan

hove je mere kol v akaash da safa ik main v chan tarian da silsila likhan
